reviews.comment:
Un lugar difícil para los motociclistas....
Sos carne de cañón si te descuidas (por la cantidad de chorros en moto que andan)
yo zafé de pedo (Y lamentablemente el policía que está ahí aunque es muy amable....
NO PUEDE HACER NADA.

(Translated by Google)
A dangerous place for motorcyclists....
You're easy prey if you're not careful (because of the number of thieves on motorcycles). I barely escaped (And unfortunately, the policeman there, although very friendly... CAN'T DO ANYTHING).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSaHJfcXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen precio, pero no deberían cargarles NAFTA a los que van en moto sin casco... Encima el que manejaba y el acompañante salieron en contra mano. Mal mal

(Translated by Google)
Good price, but they shouldn't charge gas to motorcyclists without helmets... Plus, the driver and passenger were going the wrong way down a one-way street. Bad, bad.
